StarryUniGraph
  • API Reference
  • starry_unigraph

  • View page source

starry_unigraph package

class starry_unigraph.SchedulerSession(session_ctx: SessionContext, model_spec: Any, task_adapter: Any)[source]

Bases: object

build_pipeline_engine(model: Any | None = None) → PipelineEngine[source]

Build unified PipelineEngine (new architecture, optional).

This creates a PipelineEngine that composes GraphBackend + TaskAdapter + StateManager + Model. For now, this is opt-in. Existing code path via run_epoch() still works.

Args:

model: Neural network model (if None, will be loaded from model_spec)

Returns:

PipelineEngine ready for run_epoch() calls

Note:

This is part of the Graph Mode × Task Type orthogonal separation refactoring.

build_runtime() → RuntimeBundle[source]
evaluate(split: str = 'test') → dict[str, Any][source]
classmethod from_config(config_or_path: str | Path | dict[str, Any], dataset_path: str | Path | None = None, overrides: dict[str, Any] | None = None) → SchedulerSession[source]
load_checkpoint(path: str | Path) → dict[str, Any][source]
predict(split: str = 'test') → PredictionResult[source]
prepare_data() → PreparedArtifacts[source]
run_epoch(split: str = 'train') → dict[str, Any][source]
run_task() → dict[str, Any][source]
save_checkpoint(path: str | Path) → Path[source]
